summary: Developed comprehensive quality assurance framework with initiation guidelines (ignore rules until user asks to prepare for production), baseline readiness (all tests green, lint/format clean), code & design principles (single responsibility, input validation at boundaries, typed interfaces), security (capability+nonce checks, output encoding, secrets via environment only), performance (caching, timeouts, deterministic tests), compatibility (WCAG AA, prefers-reduced-motion), documentation (updating README/PROJECT docs), observability (structured logging, metrics), and cleanup (removing temporary files, clean git status)
